title: Unibond Grout Reviver Pen, White Grout Pen for Bathroom Grout Joints, Easy to Use Tile Grout Pen, Whitener for Restoring Discoloured & Faded Joints, 1x7ml
features: Easy to apply – Thanks to the innovative pen shape, grout whitening is made simple with easy and precise application on existing grout lines to restore joints.
Easy restoration – The white grout reviver pen is ideal for easily restoring and refreshing old grout in the bathroom that has become faded and discoloured.
Mould resistant – The durable grout tile whitening pen refreshes discoloured grout joints and offers triple protection mould resistance to repel, kill and prevent mould.
Waterproof formula – The grout cleaner pen is ideal for use in the bathroom or kitchen and dries within 60 minutes, meaning showers can be used shortly after application.
Package Contents – Unibond Grout Reviver Pen, kitchen & bathroom grout cleaner to refresh discoloured/faded grout joints, easy to apply, triple mould protection, covers up to 60m*, Ice White, 1x7ml
description: From the manufacturer UniBond Grout Reviver This Grout Reviver from UniBond gives new life to faded and discoloured joints. It provides an innovative way of grouting in which the old grout is simply covered with a new layer. Thanks to the especially easy application with the handy pen, there's no need for a pro – the job can be done quickly and with ease. Additional tools are not required as the practical container allows for a precise application, even on thin grouts. Simple Application The Grout Reviver renews faded and discoloured joints with just a few movements of the hand. Preparation is key, as only then the perfect result can be generated. Surfaces should be completely freed from dirt, mould and contaminants such as residue from shampoo or soap. Before application the pen needs to be shaken and the nip depressed several times until the product flows. Then the Grout Reviver can be applied directly on the old grout joint in a smooth and even manner. Any excess material can simply be removed with a damp cloth. A second coat can be applied if desired. The grout needs 60 minutes to dry. Product Benefits at a Glance: Triple protection against mould Dries in 60 minutes Especially suitable for bathrooms, showers and kitchens Ice white colour Handy pen for a precise application Easy to Apply Thanks to the innovative pen shape, grout whitening is made simple with easy and precise application on existing grout lines to restore joints. Refreshing your bathroom or kitchen tiles has never been so easy! Waterproof and Anti-Mould The durable grout tile whitening pen refreshes discoloured grout joints and offers triple protection mould resistance to repel, kill and prevent mould. It is also waterproof and dries after just 60 minutes, making it ideal for showers. Restore and Refresh Designed to restore and refresh old bathroom grout that has become faded and discoloured – for example in the shower cubicle or bathtub wall area, your tile grout will be looking as good as new in no time! About UniBond The Henkel brand UniBond offers a wide range of DIY and professional products. The brand emphasises quality, user-friendliness and reliability. Founded in 1876, Henkel holds globally leading market positions in both the consumer and industrial businesses.
